name: Sarah Mitchell
bio: Met Sarah during freshman orientation at university. We bonded over a shared love of hiking and terrible sci-fi movies. She moved to Austin two years ago but we try to catch up regularly.

name: James Okafor
bio: James was my first manager right out of college. He taught me more about professionalism than any course ever could. Still grabs coffee whenever he is in town.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Priya and I lived on the same dorm floor for two years. She is now a product designer in Berlin. We have a standing monthly video call we rarely skip.

name: Daniel Torres
bio: Daniel and I grew up on the same street. We drifted during college but reconnected at a mutual friend's wedding. He is one of the few people I can call at 2 AM about anything.

name: Anika Chowdhury
bio: Anika joined the team as a senior engineer and quickly became someone I genuinely look up to. Outside work she runs marathons and volunteers at a local literacy program.

name: Marcus Webb
bio: Marcus and I met at the gym three years ago. What started as a fitness friendship turned into late-night diner trips and long conversations about life.

name: Layla Hassan
bio: Our families have been friends for over a decade. Layla is like a sister to me. She is studying medicine and despite the insane schedule, always makes time for a quick voice note.

name: Ethan Park
bio: Ethan was my college roommate for three years. He moved to Seoul to work at a game studio after graduation. The time difference makes it tricky but real conversations feel precious.
